name: voxel-warlock-brawl-arena
description: A 3D low-poly voxel Warlock Brawl clone (Three.js + WebGL) with P2P multiplayer (invite link, room code, QR code).

scripts.test: bash -c 'rc=0; for t in test/sim.test.mjs test/spells.test.mjs test/cast.test.mjs test/matchmaking.test.mjs test/source.test.mjs test/animations.test.mjs test/mapgen.test.mjs test/collision.test.mjs test/physics.test.mjs test/mobs.test.mjs test/items.test.mjs src/stats.test.mjs; do node $t || rc=1; done; exit $rc'
